items.title: Prompt cache TTL benchmark guide
items.oneliner: Measured cache eviction across four APIs shows 4 minute keepalives can cut agent prompt costs by up to 8x.

items.title: Lazy tmux session recovery tool
items.oneliner: Tmux session manager restores processes and scrollback after crashes, giving remote dev setups durable terminal state.

items.title: Publication-grade web text justification engine
items.oneliner: Browser typography engine brings Knuth-Plass justification and microtypography to the web for print-quality text layout.

items.title: Lean formal verification starter tutorial
items.oneliner: Hands-on Lean walkthrough teaches machine-checked proofs by formally verifying a cryptography example from scratch.

items.title: Open-source encrypted USB vault build
items.oneliner: Open hardware and firmware project shows how to build a USB drive with a hidden AES-256 encrypted volume.

items.title: Linux relocatable binary support deep dive
items.oneliner: Kernel-focused writeup explains upcoming $ORIGIN-style interpreter support and how eBPF enables relocatable binaries.

items.title: Jujutsu revset explorer and debugger
items.oneliner: Interactive revset playground lets Jujutsu users edit, visualize, and debug revision queries before scripting them.

items.title: Nagios setup for small teams
items.oneliner: Practical Nagios guide shows how to monitor 54 hosts and 104 services for about 4 dollars monthly.

items.title: Remote browser for old iPads
items.oneliner: Engineering walkthrough revives an original iPad mini using a Chromium VPS backend and custom iOS client.

items.title: Apollo guidance computer source archive
items.oneliner: Clone the original Apollo 11 flight software and study buildable guidance code from the moon landing era.
